---
format: "html"
---

## Pre-requisites

- Python Basics. To prepare or refresh: [المقدمة البايثونية للبرمجة باللغة العربية](https://halgoz.quarto.pub/pythonia/)


## Topics


## Schedule

| Lesson | Description | Material | Assignments |
| ------ | ----------- | -------- | ----------- |
| 1      |             |          |             | 

[Click to access the Schedule](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1I8qq_lphrymOCXXQTBf7ieL2SdGovz_wwqj93PLz2mQ/edit?usp=sharing)
